name: Foccaccia
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the dough rise for about 4 hours until double in size. Punch down and roll out to fit a shallow baking pan or pizza pan. The dough should be about 1 inch thick.
2. Spread olive oil thinly on top of the rolled-out dough.
3. Salt and season with your choice of herbs, such as rosemary. You can also add sun-dried tomatoes, garlic, onions, or any other herbs you prefer.
4. Bake at 375°F for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Cut into squares and serve.
